allow: Bash(pkill -f "next dev" 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1)
Bash(npm run db:generate && npm run db:push)
Bash(which psql || brew list postgresql@16 2>/dev/null || brew list postgresql@15 2>/dev/null || echo "PostgreSQL not installed")
